content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the attempt-aware reconciliation changes in `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs` and the added regressions in `tests/unit/run_queries_test.rs` and `src/cli/run.rs`. I did not find any correctness, safety, robustness, or significant maintainability issues in the implementation. I also spot-checked the new coverage with `cargo test --test unit run_queries_test::terminal_status_for_attempt_scopes_terminal_events_to_the_requested_attempt -- --exact` and `cargo test cli::run::tests::repair_missing_interrupted_handoff_run_failed_event_ignores_older_attempt_terminal_after_resume -- --exact`, both of which passed.

## Amendments

None.
